---
title: Talks & Seminars
toc: true
page-layout: full
---


Below is a curated list of invited lectures, conference presentations, public lectures, and special talks delivered over the years.

---

## Upcoming


---

## 2026

<span class="badge bg-primary">Invited Talk</span> | Graduate Student Seminar, Washington University in St. Louis | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/tree/main/2026/2026-slu-seminarseries/)


---

## 2025

<span class="badge bg-primary">Invited Talk</span> | Statistics and Data Science Seminar, Saint Louis University | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2025/2025-wustl-gss/2025_wustl_gss.pdf)


<span class="badge bg-secondary">Contributory Talk</span> | International Conference on Robust Statistics (ICORS) | Stresa, Piedmont, Italy | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2025/icors-2025/icors2025_slides.pdf)


---

## 2024

<span class="badge bg-warning">Best Paper Nominee</span> | IISA Conference 2024, Cochin University of Science and Technology | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2024/iisa2024/iisa2024_slides.pdf)

<span class="badge bg-info">Public Lecture</span> | Doctoral Research Lecture, Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2024/pre-thesis-talk.pdf)

<span class="badge bg-secondary">Contributory Talk</span> | IMS Asia Pacific Rim Meeting (APRM 2024), University of Melbourne | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2024/ims-aprm-2024.pdf)

---

## 2021

<span class="badge bg-danger">Memorial Lecture</span> | Prasanta Chandra Mahalanobis Memorial Lecture, Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2021/algorithmic-fairness/PCM%20Presentation.pdf)

---

## 2019

<span class="badge bg-danger">Memorial Lecture</span> | D. Basu Memorial Lecture, Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata | [Slide deck](https://github.com/subroy13/statwiztalks/blob/main/2019/tsne-visualization/t-SNE_%20A%20way%20to%20Visualize%20Multidimensional%20Dataset.pdf)
